framework.name: OpenID Agentic Identity Whitepaper (Oct 2025)
framework.description: OpenID Foundation's first comprehensive whitepaper on agent identity. Confirms OAuth 2.1 works within single trust domains but explicitly states it falls short for cross-domain, async, and recursive delegation. Names recursive delegation as an unsolved problem, not a solved one.
framework.raw_quote: Recursive delegation creates risks. Agents spawning sub-agents or communicating tasks to other agents create complex authorization chains without clear scope attenuation mechanisms.

source.title: [PDF] Identity Management for Agentic AI - OpenID
